testcase.name: test_create_report
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_housekeeping_module.py:105: in test_create_report assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create report: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create report: 500 - {"statusCode":500,"message":"Internal server error"} E assert 500 in [200, 201] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_found_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_housekeeping_module.py:181: in test_create_found_item assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create found item: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create found item: 500 - {"statusCode":500,"message":"Internal server error"} E assert 500 in [200, 201] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_report_workflow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_housekeeping_module.py:354: in test_full_report_workflow assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"statusCode":500,"message":"Internal server error"} E assert 500 in [200, 201] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_found_item_workflow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_housekeeping_module.py:417: in test_full_found_item_workflow assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"statusCode":500,"message":"Internal server error"} E assert 500 in [200, 201] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
